title: Age of Blades
description: This mod offers various different new weapons and tools with a medieval based theme. Long crafting trees and etc are in the mod to make it harder.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/170de42a539730c976606c96e46911bbe9922646_0.webp)
This mod adds mediveal themed swords, armour, bows, crossbows. Costume crafting table with long crafting trees to make many new items. There's also a new alloy which can be made by smelting an iron ingot in a smelther. 
 
This mod is available for Forge and NeoForge.

![Workbench Tier 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46f91d2fbcd666a399fd46b716b086cd4e7b3051_0.webp)
Workbench Tier 1

[CLICK HERE](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3278)
![https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3278](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfd1227ccf47aecb859ac759a37a1b33081901e7_0.webp)
